summary: The 'nuniesmith/futures' monorepo is a production-grade futures trading co-pilot featuring ML-driven breakout detection (87% acc CNN), FastAPI/HTMX dashboard, NinjaTrader 8 C# bridge, Docker orchestration, Redis/Postgres persistence, and full observability. Strengths include modular lib/services split, 30+ pytest suite, excellent docs, and CI/CD. Critical gaps: missing TPT 4PM hard flatten (account termination risk), unvalidated ONNX/PyTorch parity, committed DLLs supply-chain vulnerability, and incomplete FastAPI validation hinder live prop trading readiness.
priority_actions: Implement TPT 4PM ET hard flatten in BreakoutStrategy.cs with risk block until 18:00 ET
Validate/automate ONNX ↔ PyTorch parity test in CI for v6 18-feature model
Add SHA256 checksum verification for committed DLLs in deploy_nt8.ps1
Add Pydantic models and rate limiting to all FastAPI data/api endpoints
Deploy/test NT8 full session: verify tabular dim=18, TP3 mults loaded, no OCO/signal errors

findings.title: Missing TPT 4PM Hard Flatten
findings.description: BreakoutStrategy.cs lacks 16:00 ET position flatten for Take Profit Trader compliance, risking overnight holds and account termination (todo.md critical).
findings.recommendation: Add OnBarUpdate() guard: if TptMode && ET hour>=16 && positions>0, FlattenAll('TPT_HARD_STOP'); unblock at 18:00 ET. Test sim/live.

findings.title: Unvalidated ONNX/PyTorch Inference Parity
findings.description: Pending parity check on models/breakout_cnn_best.* for v6 18-features risks Python/NT8 divergence (todo.md).
findings.recommendation: Extend test_phase3_ema9_parity.py for batch inference; assert max abs diff <1e-4. Automate in CI pytest.

findings.title: Committed OnnxRuntime DLLs Without Checksums
findings.description: src/ninja/dll/ binaries risk tampering; deploy_nt8.ps1 lacks verification.
findings.recommendation: Add SHA256 checksums in deploy_nt8.ps1; verify before NT8 copy. Consider NuGet restore isolation.

findings.title: FastAPI Endpoints Lack Pydantic/Rate Limiting
findings.description: data/api/*.py (positions, sar, trades) miss input validation and rate_limit, vulnerable to injection/malformed requests.
findings.recommendation: Add Pydantic BaseModels and Depends(rate_limit) to all POST/PUT/DELETE; audit SQLi/XSS.

findings.title: Python+C# Monorepo Complexity
findings.description: Mixed langs; pyproject.toml ignores C#, manual csproj patches in deploy scripts complicate CI/testing.
findings.recommendation: Add dotnet format/lint/test to .github/workflows/ci-cd.yml; isolate NT8 build; consider ninja/ subrepo.

findings.title: Potential API Key Exposure in Docs/Env
findings.description: README.md/.env.example placeholders; docker-compose.yml secrets lack rotation guidance.
findings.recommendation: Confirm .env in .gitignore; add GitHub secret scanning; rotate MASSIVE/XAI/KRAKEN keys quarterly.

findings.title: Forex Tick Precision Bug in UI
findings.description: 6E asset cards collapse entry/stop/TP due to 4-decimal rounding vs 5-decimal tick (todo.md).
findings.recommendation: Use MICRO_CONTRACT_SPECS tick_size in web/main.py _compute_entry_zone() for dynamic precision.

findings.title: No C# Unit Tests
findings.description: Python 30+ tests; C# relies on manual NT8 Analyzer (no NUnit).
findings.recommendation: Add NUnit for range builders/phases/MTF; integrate dotnet test in CI.

findings.title: Duplicated Data Fetch Logic
findings.description: Cache→DB→API repeated; no unified resolver for services/training.
findings.recommendation: Implement DataResolver in services/data/main.py: Redis→Postgres→Massive/Kraken with backfill.

findings.title: No Trading/Review UI Modes
findings.description: Dashboard cluttered during trading; no toggle (todo.md).
findings.recommendation: Add localStorage toggle in web/main.py; CSS .mode-trading/.mode-review.

strengths: Comprehensive 30+ pytest suite (ORB, ICT, risk, scheduler, integrations, parity tests)
Modular architecture: lib/analysis/core/services + feature_contract.json parity enforcement
Production Docker Compose (7 services, healthchecks), Tailscale CI/CD with Discord notifies
Mature ML: 87.1% acc CNN (v6 18-features, ONNX export, 13 breakout types, balanced datasets)
Excellent docs: README/todo/STRATEGY_PLAN + model sync/deploy scripts
Monorepo consolidation: Python engine/web/trainer + C# NT8 + models/DLLs
weaknesses: Mixed Python/C# increases CI/testing complexity; no C# linter/tests
Heavy deps (torch GPU-optional, onnxruntime); ~80MB LFS bloat from models/DLLs
UI noisy (Grok auto-poll, no trading/review modes); forex precision issues
Duplicated data resolvers; Kraken training integration pending
Incomplete FastAPI validation; committed binaries supply-chain risk
TODO backlog (20+ items) despite clean code and many completions
tech_debt: Settings page (/settings) for env toggles/API status/Tailscale IPs
Kraken keys in CI secrets + full training/data resolver integration
Cross-asset signals (crypto-futures correlation → CNN v7 feature)
C# NUnit tests + dotnet lint/format in CI
Per-type/session win-rate Grafana panels + feature contract drift detection
next_steps: Run full tests/lint: pytest src/tests/ -x --cov && ruff check src/
NT8 deploy/test: scripts/deploy_nt8.bat -Launch; check logs (dim=18, TP3 mults)
Docker up monitoring: docker compose --profile monitoring up -d; verify localhost:8180
Fix high findings: TPT flatten, ONNX parity test, DLL checksums
Test Kraken training: add keys to .env/CI; run dataset_generator
Live NT8/Python side-by-side session; audit logs/performance
Add C# tests/DataResolver; retrain if parity fails
